overview.description: The iShares Systematic Alternatives Active ETF (IALT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in multi-strategy alternatives. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term total returns across equities, fixed income, commodities, and currencies from developed and emerging markets. The fund utilizes quantitative models and proprietary ranking techniques. IALT was launched on Dec 9, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Three key ETF themes to watch in 2026, according to BlackRock's Jacobs
data.text: Jay Jacobs, U.S. head of equity ETFs at BlackRock, joins CNBC's "Halftime Report" to discuss his ETF investment tips and key growth areas for 2026.
